Handles election creation, candidate management, vote casting,      and transparent result tallying on the blockchain.      Election lifecycle: Draft \u2192 Ongoing \u2192 Completed      Votes are immutable and transparent once cast.","kind":"dev","methods":{"addCandidate(uint256,string,string,string)":{"details":"Add a candidate to an election.
